channel.title: Model Router on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Model Router on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Policy Coverage for Model Router in Foundry Models
item.description:
Azure Policy now supports centralized governance for deployments that use the model router in Foundry Models. This lets organizations define and enforce routing standards to align model selection with security, compliance, and operational requirements.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: ai: How to run evals for the model router
item.description:
The post explains how to evaluate the Foundry model router using an open-source GitHub repo for router-aware eval pipelines. It covers running quality, cost, and latency evaluations.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
